item.title: eto-ai / lance
item.description:
Desc: Modern columnar data format for ML implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, with more integrations coming..
Lang: Rust
Star: 1067
